series_metadata.series_description: Lists, tables, or other compilations documenting the warrant number, dollar amount, issue date, voucher ID, payee, unclaimed funds claim number, vendor ID and other information for issued warrants.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Paper journals prior or June 30, 2010: no longer of administrative value, provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report issued. ; Electronic: Electronic or Machine Readable Journals before or July 1, 2010: no longer of administrative value, provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report issued
